description: Release stabilization is now a single-line change in eng/Versions.props (flipping StabilizePackageVersion to true) — no more hand-editing package version files, CI job overrides, or SKIP lists. A new Stabilization Check CI job validates stable packing, CLI tests, and template smoke tests on every PR, catching NU5104 and restore regressions before stabilization time.
name: Automated release stabilization with dynamic package version computation
